description: Admission Control and Policy Enforcement — Webhooks, OPA/Kyverno, and Pod Security
summary: Admission Control and Policy Enforcement — Webhooks, OPA/Kyverno, and Pod Security
target_audience: Learners who have completed Kubernetes Intermediate 2 (already familiar with RBAC, scheduling, NetworkPolicy, Helm, and monitoring)

lectures.title: Admission Control and Policy Enforcement — Webhooks, OPA/Kyverno, and Pod Security
objectives: Understand where Validating and Mutating Admission Webhooks sit in the API request processing pipeline
Define policies with OPA Gatekeeper or Kyverno to block or mutate non-compliant resources
Apply Pod Security Admission to enforce security standards at the namespace level
